_description: Centralized strategy parameter configuration. All systems should reference this file.

AlphaTrendV1Strategy.description: Trend-following long-only strategy. Enters on MA crossover vs its offset copy (AlphaMACross), exits on ATR-based stop loss or after a fixed holding period. Uses risk-based position sizing.

exit_rules.description: Time Exit: close the position after time_exit days

ma_offset.description: Number of bars to offset the comparison MA (acts as smoothing)

ma_length.description: Length of the moving average. Must be one of 7, 14, 20, 30, 50, 90, 200 (read from raw data).

atr_sl.description: Multiplier applied to 14-day ATR to find the initial stop loss

time_exit.description: Number of days after which the position is closed

risk_perc.description: Total risk as a percent of total capital per trade

AlphaTrendV2Strategy.description: Trend-following long-only strategy. Identical entry, stop loss and position sizing as AlphaTrend V1 but replaces the time exit with a combined multi-indicator exit (ADX + ROC + MACD + MFI) where each sub-rule can be independently toggled. When multiple rules are enabled, ALL enabled rules must simultaneously signal exit to close the position.

exit_rules.description: Combined exit: all ENABLED of [ADX<threshold, ROC<threshold, MACD_signal<0, MFI<50 for N consecutive bars] must fire.

ma_offset.description: Number of bars to offset the comparison MA (acts as smoothing)

ma_length.description: Length of the moving average. Must be one of 7, 14, 20, 30, 50, 90, 200 (read from raw data).

atr_sl.description: Multiplier applied to 14-day ATR to find the initial stop loss

risk_perc.description: Total risk as a percent of total capital per trade

adx_exit_enabled.description: Enable the ADX exit sub-rule (ADX < adx_threshold)

adx_threshold.description: ADX level below which the ADX sub-rule signals exit

roc_exit_enabled.description: Enable the ROC exit sub-rule (ROC < roc_threshold)

roc_period.description: Lookback period (bars) for the rate-of-change calculation

roc_threshold.description: ROC % level below which the ROC sub-rule signals exit

mfi_exit_enabled.description: Enable the MFI exit sub-rule (MFI < 50 for N consecutive bars)

mfi_consecutive_days.description: Number of consecutive bars MFI must be below 50 for the MFI sub-rule to exit

AlphaTrendV2C2Strategy.description: Trend-following long-only strategy. Identical entry, initial stop loss and position sizing as AlphaTrend V2, but with a three-stage lifecycle exit: peace-period (initial SL only), short-term (initial SL plus optional break-even consecutive-bars rule) and long-term (trailing SL at a fixed percent below close, moves up only; plus the portfolio-level vulnerability scorer).

exit_rules.description: Initial Stop Loss: Entry - (atr_sl x ATR14)
Three-stage lifecycle: peace (SL only), short-term (SL + optional close-below-entry for N consecutive bars), long-term (trailing SL + portfolio vulnerability scorer).

ma_offset.description: Number of bars to offset the comparison MA (acts as smoothing)

ma_length.description: Length of the moving average. Must be one of 7, 14, 20, 30, 50, 90, 200 (read from raw data).

atr_sl.description: Multiplier applied to 14-day ATR to find the initial stop loss

risk_perc.description: Total risk as a percent of total capital per trade

peace_period_candles.description: Length of the peace-period stage in bars (only the initial SL can close the trade during this stage)

short_term_candles.description: Length of the short-term stage in bars (SL + optional break-even consecutive-bars rule)

short_phase_exit_enabled.description: Enable the short-phase break-even exit rule. When true, the trade is closed when the close stays strictly below the entry price for break_even_consecutive_bars consecutive bars. The initial SL is always active regardless of this flag.

break_even_consecutive_bars.description: Number of consecutive bars (including current) the close must stay strictly below the entry price for the short-phase rule to fire

trailing_sl_pct.description: Long-term trailing SL distance as a percent of the current close. The SL only moves up, never down.

AlphaTrendV2C3Strategy.description: Trend-following long-only strategy. Identical to AlphaTrend V2C2 except (1) the entry signal must be confirmed by an n-bar closing high, and (2) the long-term trailing stop loss uses a multiple of the 14-day ATR (same indicator as the initial SL) instead of a fixed percentage. After an AlphaMACross long signal, the trade is opened on the first bar (within an entry_wait_candles-bar window after the cross) whose close is strictly greater than the maximum close over the prior high_lookback_candles bars. A new cross resets the wait window; if the window expires without confirmation, the signal is discarded. Initial stop loss, position sizing and the three-stage exit lifecycle are otherwise unchanged from V2C2.

exit_rules.description: Initial Stop Loss: Entry - (atr_sl x ATR14)
Three-stage lifecycle: peace (SL only), short-term (SL + optional close-below-entry for N consecutive bars), long-term (ATR-based trailing SL + portfolio vulnerability scorer).

ma_offset.description: Number of bars to offset the comparison MA (acts as smoothing)

ma_length.description: Length of the moving average. Must be one of 7, 14, 20, 30, 50, 90, 200 (read from raw data).

atr_sl.description: Multiplier applied to 14-day ATR to find the initial stop loss

risk_perc.description: Total risk as a percent of total capital per trade

high_lookback_candles.description: Number of prior bars (excluding the current bar) used to evaluate the closing-high entry confirmation. The current close must be strictly greater than the maximum close over these bars.

entry_wait_candles.description: Number of bars after the cross during which the strategy keeps watching for the high confirmation. 0 means the high must be reached on the cross bar itself.

peace_period_candles.description: Length of the peace-period stage in bars (only the initial SL can close the trade during this stage)

short_term_candles.description: Length of the short-term stage in bars (SL + optional break-even consecutive-bars rule)

short_phase_exit_enabled.description: Enable the short-phase break-even exit rule. When true, the trade is closed when the close stays strictly below the entry price for break_even_consecutive_bars consecutive bars. The initial SL is always active regardless of this flag.

break_even_consecutive_bars.description: Number of consecutive bars (including current) the close must stay strictly below the entry price for the short-phase rule to fire

trailing_atr_mult.description: Multiplier on the 14-day ATR for the long-term trailing SL. The SL is maintained at close - (trailing_atr_mult x ATR14) and only moves up, never down.

AlphaTrendV3C1Strategy.description: Trend-following long-only strategy. Identical to AlphaTrend V2C3 plus two independently toggleable rules: (1) an additional entry filter requiring a pre-calculated EMA of length entry_ema_length to be strictly above a pre-calculated SMA of length entry_sma_length (both read from raw data) on the bar the trade would open; and (2) an additional overextension exit that closes the position when the close is at least exit_ema_distance_pct percent above a pre-calculated EMA of length exit_ema_length, measured as (close - EMA) / EMA * 100. The exit is evaluated only in the short-term and long-term stages (never during the peace period). When both flags are off the strategy behaves exactly like V2C3.

exit_rules.description: Initial Stop Loss: Entry - (atr_sl x ATR14)

Three-stage lifecycle: peace (SL only), short-term (SL + optional close-below-entry for N consecutive bars + EMA-distance exit), long-term (ATR-based trailing SL + EMA-distance exit + portfolio vulnerability scorer).

ma_offset.description: Number of bars to offset the comparison MA (acts as smoothing)

ma_length.description: Length of the moving average. Must be one of 7, 14, 20, 30, 50, 90, 200 (read from raw data).

atr_sl.description: Multiplier applied to 14-day ATR to find the initial stop loss

risk_perc.description: Total risk as a percent of total capital per trade

high_lookback_candles.description: Number of prior bars (excluding the current bar) used to evaluate the closing-high entry confirmation. The current close must be strictly greater than the maximum close over these bars.

entry_wait_candles.description: Number of bars after the cross during which the strategy keeps watching for the high confirmation. 0 means the high must be reached on the cross bar itself.

entry_ema_sma_filter_enabled.description: Enable the additional entry filter requiring entry_ema_length EMA to be strictly above entry_sma_length SMA on the bar the trade would open. When false, entries behave exactly like V2C3.

entry_ema_length.description: Length of the EMA used by the entry filter (EMA must be above the SMA). Must be one of 7, 14, 20, 30, 50, 90, 200 (read from raw data).

entry_sma_length.description: Length of the SMA used by the entry filter (EMA must be above the SMA). Must be one of 7, 14, 20, 30, 50, 90, 200 (read from raw data).

peace_period_candles.description: Length of the peace-period stage in bars (only the initial SL can close the trade during this stage)

short_term_candles.description: Length of the short-term stage in bars (SL + optional break-even consecutive-bars rule + EMA-distance exit)

short_phase_exit_enabled.description: Enable the short-phase break-even exit rule. When true, the trade is closed when the close stays strictly below the entry price for break_even_consecutive_bars consecutive bars. The initial SL is always active regardless of this flag.

break_even_consecutive_bars.description: Number of consecutive bars (including current) the close must stay strictly below the entry price for the short-phase rule to fire

trailing_atr_mult.description: Multiplier on the 14-day ATR for the long-term trailing SL. The SL is maintained at close - (trailing_atr_mult x ATR14) and only moves up, never down.

ema_distance_exit_enabled.description: Enable the additional overextension exit that closes the position when the close is at least exit_ema_distance_pct percent above the exit_ema_length EMA. Fires only in the short-term and long-term stages (never during the peace period).

exit_ema_length.description: Length of the EMA used by the overextension exit. Must be one of 7, 14, 20, 30, 50, 90, 200 (read from raw data).

exit_ema_distance_pct.description: Minimum percentage the close must exceed the exit EMA by for the overextension exit to fire, measured as (close - EMA) / EMA * 100.

RandomControlStrategy.description: Control/baseline strategy with random entry and exit for comparison. Uses risk-based position sizing.

atr_multiplier.description: ATR multiplier for stop loss calculation

risk_percent.description: Percentage of equity to risk per trade at stop loss

random_seed.description: Random seed for reproducibility (null for random)
